Synopsys DW UART 1 - [boot-path only]

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x50910000
Size:
0x100
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

DesignWare DW_apb_uart. 16550-compatible UART with APB bus interface. Registers are on 32-bit boundaries. Registers at 0x00, 0x04, and 0x08 are aliased: at 0x00 reads access RBR, writes access THR, and DLAB=1 (LCR[7]) accesses DLL; at 0x04 DLAB=0 accesses IER, DLAB=1 accesses DLH; at 0x08 reads access IIR, writes access FCR.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x00 rbr Receive Buffer / Transmit Holding / Divisor Latch Low
0x04 ier Interrupt Enable / Divisor Latch High
0x08 iir Interrupt Identity / FIFO Control
0x0C lcr Line Control
0x10 mcr Modem Control
0x14 lsr Line Status
0x18 msr Modem Status
0x1C scr Scratchpad
0x20 lpdll Low Power Divisor Latch Low
0x24 lpdlh Low Power Divisor Latch High
0x28 - -
0x30 srbr[16] Shadow Receive Buffer / Shadow Transmit Holding
0x70 far FIFO Access
0x74 tfr Transmit FIFO Read
0x78 rfw Receive FIFO Write
0x7C usr UART Status
0x80 tfl Transmit FIFO Level
0x84 rfl Receive FIFO Level
0x88 srr Software Reset
0x8C srts Shadow Request to Send
0x90 sbcr Shadow Break Control
0x94 sdmam Shadow DMA Mode
0x98 sfe Shadow FIFO Enable
0x9C srt Shadow RCVR Trigger
0xA0 stet Shadow TX Empty Trigger
0xA4 htx Halt TX
0xA8 dmasa DMA Software Acknowledge
0xAC - -
0xF4 cpr Component Parameter
0xF8 ucv UART Component Version
0xFC ctr Component Type
